name: grep
description:
Search file contents for a regex pattern within the project directory.

Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers.
Results are capped at 100 matches. Skips binary files.

**Response format:**
```json
{"matches": [{"path": "src/main.py", "line": 42, "content": "def main():"}], "total": 1, "truncated": false}
```

glob.description: Optional file pattern to restrict search (e.g. '**/*.py')
